top_findings.summary: The skill description requests "allowed-tools: [Read, Write, Edit, Bash]" which grants broad system access (full file system read/write/edit permissions and arbitrary command execution) for a research lookup tool whose core function is querying an external API. This level of access is excessive for a service that primarily performs web searches and returns text results. Additionally, the skill mentions automatically generating and saving diagrams to the filesystem without clear user consent mechanisms for these file operations.
